title: init walkthrough writes '(text)' placeholder for all ConfigType::String keys (tracker_remote, sentinel models)
description:
## Symptom

Every repo initialized after the init walkthrough TUI landed (commit unknown — predates #736) gets a corrupt hook-config.json with the literal string \"(text)\" as the value for every ConfigType::String key:
- tracker_remote: \"(text)\"
- sentinel.default_agent.model: \"(text)\"
- sentinel.escalation.model: \"(text)\"

In repos with a remote, this manifests as:
- crosslink sync prints \"Warning: push failed (offline)\" or \"error: push failed: remote '(text)' is not a valid git endpoint\"
- crosslink locks list shows stale L1 referencing unpromoted offline issue with id -1
- Local issues created before first sync stay at sentinel id -1 even after manual git push of crosslink/hub and crosslink/knowledge to origin
- crosslink init --force does NOT recover, because populate_tracker_remote() in init/mod.rs:347 treats anything ≠ \"origin\" as a manual edit

## Root cause

\`crosslink/src/commands/config_registry.rs:538-559\` build_config() materializes TUI selections into config values. For ConfigType::String, options_for_key() (line 445) returns vec![\"(text)\"] as a UI placeholder meaning \"this is a free-text field, not a cycle option.\" build_config()'s default match arm at line 552 then writes that placeholder verbatim into the config:

\`\`\`rust
let val = match entry.config_type {
    ConfigType::Bool => match val_str { ... },
    _ => serde_json::Value::String(val_str.to_string()),  // ← bug: writes \"(text)\" for String keys
};
\`\`\`

apply_tui_choices() in init/walkthrough.rs:643-645 then overwrites the template defaults (which were correct, e.g. \"origin\") with the corrupt values.

## Reproduction

1. crosslink init in any new repo with the walkthrough TUI
2. cat .crosslink/hook-config.json | grep tracker_remote → shows \"(text)\"

## Fix

In config_registry.rs build_config() at line ~547, either:
- Skip ConfigType::String entries (preserve template default)
- Or only insert when the user actually entered a value (the TUI has no text-input handler today, so the answer is \"never insert\")

Audit: also confirm none of the other corrupted String keys cause silent breakage. sentinel models with \"(text)\" will at minimum fail any later sentinel dispatch.

## Recovery for existing affected repos

\`\`\`
crosslink config set tracker_remote origin
crosslink config set sentinel.default_agent.model <model>
crosslink config set sentinel.escalation.model <model>
\`\`\`

Cannot be auto-fixed by init --force because populate_tracker_remote() refuses to touch non-\"origin\" values.

## Related

- #736 (GH#586): fixed the classifier and tracker_remote write-on-init logic, but did not touch build_config()
- #738 (GH#583): bootstrap auto-complete — orthogonal
